steps.title: Use the stated conclusion
steps.content: La Paz respondents reported higher park use even though fewer of them lived within a 10-minute walk of a park. The text explicitly concludes that proximity alone cannot explain the difference.

steps.title: Choose the nonproximity cause
steps.content: The matching option restates that something other than proximity must be causing the difference in park use. Choice A mentions expectations, Choice B mentions older sources, and Choice C mentions inaccurate survey results, but none of those ideas appears in the text. The answer is D.
